items.headline: Late Virgil van Dijk header gives Liverpool crucial Merseyside derby win over Everton
items.description: Virgil van Dijk scored a stoppage-time header to win the first Merseyside derby and boost Liverpool's hopes of securing Champions League football next season.

items.description: Everton host Liverpool for the first time at the Hill Dickinson Stadium as the clubs vie for a top five spot.

items.headline: Man City vs. Arsenal LIVE: Latest updates from mammoth Premier League title race clash
items.description: The Premier League title race takes centre stage this afternoon as Manchester City host Arsenal in a game that could a long way to deciding where the trophy ends up in May, and you can follow it all with ESPN.

items.headline: Morgan Gibbs-White hits hat trick as Nottingham Forest beat Burnley to pile misery on Spurs
items.description: Morgan Gibbs-White fired a 15-minute hat trick to move Nottingham Forest closer to Premier League survival after a 4-1 win over Burnley.

items.headline: Aston Villa earn last-gasp win over Sunderland in seven-goal thriller
items.description: Tammy Abraham scored a stoppage-time winner as Aston Villa took a huge step to securing Champions League football next season with a dramatic 4-3 victory over Sunderland.

items.description: Mikel Arteta has named Kai Havertz in Arsenal's starting XI for Sunday's clash against Manchester City, with Viktor Gyökeres dropping to the bench.

items.headline: Why did RR bowl so much spin against KKR? Parag explains

items.headline: Charles Barkley: Talking with Michael Jordan again after rift
items.description: Charles Barkley says he and Michael Jordan are talking again after nearly 15 years and that the two plan to play golf together in the offseason.
